instruction: In Apple Notes, move the note titled "Project Ideas" from the folder "Notes" into the folder "Archive".

parameters.note_body: Move this note to the archive.

reference_command:
note_index=$(memo notes | awk '/^[0-9]+\./ { idx=$1; sub(/\./, "", idx); line=$0; sub(/^[0-9]+\. /, "", line); n=split(line, parts, " - "); title=parts[n]; if (title == "Project Ideas") { print idx; exit } }')
if [ -z "$note_index" ]; then
  echo "Note not found: Project Ideas"
  exit 1
fi
printf '%s\n%s\n' "$note_index" "Archive" | memo notes --move
